author: Anurag M
name: Probatum Baseline — QAT + LeakyReLU² + EMA
blurb: Non-record baseline submission adapting quantization-aware training and distillation techniques from the Probatum Code project to the 16MB parameter golf constraint. MLX local baseline (M2 Pro): val_bpb 2.3502 at 200 steps. Pending 8xH100 run for full 10-min training.
status: WIP - MLX local baseline, pending RunPod 8xH100 run
note: 200 steps with 8192 tokens/step. Full 8xH100 run expected to reach ~1.22 BPB at 13,000+ steps.
